findings.source_type_citation: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics Form 10-Q filed on May 11, 2026
findings.competitors_citation: The report is filed by MoonLake Immunotherapeutics (MLTX).
findings.keywords_citation: The quarterly report details the clinical development of sonelokimab for hidradenitis suppurativa (HS) and its mechanism as an IL-17 inhibitor.
findings.summary: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics reported its first quarter 2026 financial results, ending the period with $357.9 million in cash and cash equivalents. The report also highlights the positive outcome of the pre-BLA meeting for sonelokimab in HS and the progress of other clinical trials in psoriatic arthritis (PsA).
findings.summary_citation: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics Form 10-Q for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, filed May 11, 2026.
findings.publication_date_citation: The filing date of the Form 10-Q is May 11, 2026.

findings.source_domain_citation: The filing is hosted on MoonLake's investor relations domain.

findings.source_type_citation: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics Form 8-K filed on May 11, 2026
findings.competitors_citation: The report is filed by MoonLake Immunotherapeutics (MLTX).
findings.keywords_citation: The report discusses sonelokimab (SLK), an IL-17 inhibitor, for the treatment of hidradenitis suppurativa (HS).
findings.summary: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics announced a positive outcome from its final pre-BLA meeting with the FDA for sonelokimab in hidradenitis suppurativa. The FDA aligned on submission plans and the label strategy, which is expected to include both adult and adolescent patients (12 years and older). The BLA submission is planned for September 2026.

findings.source_type_citation: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics filed its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ended March 31, 2026, and a Current Report on Form 8-K on May 11, 2026.
findings.competitors_citation: The filing is from MoonLake Immunotherapeutics (MLTX).
findings.keywords_citation: The filing discusses 'sonelokimab (SLK) in hidradenitis suppurativa (HS)' and its mechanism as a 'tri-specific IL-17A and IL-17F inhibiting Nanobody'.
findings.summary: MoonLake announced a positive outcome from its final pre-BLA meeting with the FDA for sonelokimab in hidradenitis suppurativa, with a planned BLA submission for the end of September 2026. The company also reported first quarter 2026 financial results, with cash and equivalents totaling $357.9 million and a cash runway into 2027.
findings.summary_citation: MoonLake announced a positive outcome of its final pre-BLA meeting held on April 1, 2026, with the FDA on the HS program... BLA submission to the FDA is planned for the end of September 2026... ending the first quarter with $357.9 million in cash, cash equivalents and short-term marketable debt securities.
findings.publication_date_citation: MoonLake filed the 8-K and 10-Q on May 11, 2026.
findings.source_domain_citation: The documents were accessed through the investor relations website of MoonLake Immunotherapeutics.

findings.summary: Incyte announced that over 20 abstracts from its hematology and oncology franchises will be presented at the European Hematology Association (EHA) 2026 Congress, including Phase 3 data for tafasitamab and Phase 2/3 data for INCA033989.
findings.summary_citation: Incyte (Nasdaq:INCY) today announced that data from key programs in its Hematology and Oncology franchises will be presented at the European Hematology Association (EHA) 2026 Congress, to be held June 11 - 14, 2026, in Stockholm, Sweden.
